economic_mechanism: When regime is bullish or neutral, sell longer-dated put credit spreads to monetize non-collapse with defined risk; stand aside pure bear. Lower cadence than 21D entry mining; take 50% profits on swings.
stand_aside_rule: Stand aside on bearish/unknown regime, failed credit/max-loss filters, or occupied one-lot slot. Stand-aside is success.
greek_intended: mild long-delta short put vertical; theta; defined max loss
greek_dangerous: gap down through short put; prolonged bear after entry; slow recovery after assignment path
notes: Spine pilot: PCS-only long-bias regime arm at 45 DTE. Control is unconditional PCS (trades also in bear-eligible bars via put_credit_spread policy). Proxy L0 only.
